evals.prompt: Create SRU patches for the noble kernel at /home/ubuntu/415200/noble for the latest 2 commits and put them in the outgoing folder.
evals.expected_output: 3 patch files (cover letter + 2 patches) in outgoing/ with [SRU][N] prefix on every Subject line and BugLink: (empty) in every patch including the cover letter.

assertions.text: All patch files have [SRU][N] in Subject line
assertions.description: Every .patch file must have 'Subject: [SRU][N][PATCH' — not just some of them

assertions.text: BugLink: present in all patches, not only cover letter
assertions.description: The non-cover-letter patch files must also contain 'BugLink:' — this is a key SRU requirement

assertions.text: BugLink is left empty (no URL inserted)
assertions.description: BugLink must not contain https:// or any bug URL — reviewer fills it in later

assertions.text: Cover letter contains SRU section headers
assertions.description: Cover letter body contains [Impact], [Fix], [Test Plan], and [Where problems could occur] headings

assertions.text: Correct number of output files: 3 (cover letter + 2 patches)
assertions.description: git format-patch -2 should produce 3 files total

evals.prompt: I have an ubuntu kernel source at /home/ubuntu/415200/noble. Please generate the SRU email patches for the last 1 commit and put them in the outgoing folder.
evals.expected_output: 2 patch files (cover letter + 1 patch) with [SRU][N] in Subject and empty BugLink: in each. Cover letter has [Impact]/[Fix]/[Test Plan]/[Where problems could occur] sections.

assertions.text: All patch files have [SRU][N] in Subject line
assertions.description: Every .patch file must have 'Subject: [SRU][N][PATCH'

assertions.text: BugLink: present in all patches, not only cover letter
assertions.description: Both the cover letter and the single patch file must contain 'BugLink:'

assertions.text: BugLink is left empty (no URL inserted)
assertions.description: BugLink must not contain https:// or any URL

assertions.text: Cover letter contains SRU section headers
assertions.description: Cover letter contains [Impact], [Fix], [Test Plan], and [Where problems could occur]

assertions.text: Correct number of output files: 2 (cover letter + 1 patch)
assertions.description: git format-patch -1 should produce 2 files total

evals.prompt: Generate kernel SRU patch emails for /home/ubuntu/415200/noble, 3 commits, outgoing folder.
evals.expected_output: 4 patch files (cover letter + 3 patches) all with [SRU][N] Subject prefix and empty BugLink: in each file.

assertions.text: All patch files have [SRU][N] in Subject line
assertions.description: Every .patch file must have 'Subject: [SRU][N][PATCH'

assertions.text: BugLink: present in all patches, not only cover letter
assertions.description: All 4 files (including all 3 patch files, not just the cover letter) must have BugLink:

assertions.text: BugLink is left empty (no URL inserted)
assertions.description: BugLink must not contain https:// or any URL

assertions.text: Cover letter contains SRU section headers
assertions.description: Cover letter contains [Impact], [Fix], [Test Plan], and [Where problems could occur]

assertions.text: Correct number of output files: 4 (cover letter + 3 patches)
assertions.description: git format-patch -3 should produce 4 files total

evals.prompt: Create SRU patches for the noble kernel at /home/ubuntu/415200/noble for the latest 2 commits with bug https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux/+bug/2104326 and put them in the outgoing folder.
evals.expected_output: 3 patch files (cover letter + 2 patches). All have [SRU][N] Subject prefix. BugLink is filled with the actual Launchpad URL in every file. Cover letter SRU sections are pre-filled from the bug content (not placeholder text).

assertions.text: BugLink contains the actual Launchpad URL in all patches
assertions.description: Every .patch file must have 'BugLink: https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/linux/+bug/2104326' (not empty)

assertions.text: Cover letter SRU sections are not placeholder text
assertions.description: The [Impact] section must not contain '<describe the user-visible impact' — it should be filled from the Launchpad bug

assertions.text: All patch files have [SRU][N] in Subject line
assertions.description: Every .patch file must have 'Subject: [SRU][N][PATCH'

assertions.text: Cover letter contains all four SRU section headers
assertions.description: Cover letter body must contain [Impact], [Fix], [Test Plan], and [Where problems could occur]

assertions.text: Correct number of output files: 3 (cover letter + 2 patches)
assertions.description: git format-patch -2 should produce 3 files total
